summary: NVIDIA Data Center revenue exceeded $30B in Q1 2026 with >75% gross margins; faces ~40% memory production cut from HBM shortage. Intel Q1 revenue +7% YoY (first positive turn in years) under CEO Lip-Bu Tan's 18A foundry turnaround. AMD positioned as second-supplier choice for cost-aware hyperscalers. Chinese overcapacity in mature-node semiconductors adds macro headwind to entire sector.
